name: First International Bank & Trust
description_short: First International Bank & Trust (FIBT) is a full-service bank offering personal and business banking, checking, savings, credit cards, and trust management services.
description_long:
First International Bank & Trust (FIBT) is an established banking institution that provides comprehensive financial services to both personal and business customers. The company operates a full-service banking platform accessible through their website at fibt.com, with multiple account types and digital channels for customer access.

FIBT offers a broad range of banking products including personal checking and savings accounts, credit cards, business banking solutions, trust account management, retirement accounts, and agricultural financing services. Customers can access their accounts through online banking, eZBusiness (business platform), mobile access, and in-person banking. The bank provides financial calculators, mortgage services (home purchase and refinancing), and specialized guidance for industry-specific needs like agricultural cash flow management.

FIBT distinguishes itself through several recognitions and specializations. The bank was ranked #6 on the American Banker Top Performers List in 2025, named one of the 50 Best Places to Work, and recognized as a Top 50 ACH Originator by Nacha in 2025. The company demonstrates particular expertise in agricultural banking and trust services, with dedicated resources for seasonal cash flow management and fraud prevention in trust accounts. Their leadership team includes executives recognized on professional best-practices lists.

FIBT is a legitimate, regulated banking institution suitable for customers seeking traditional banking services with institutional credibility. However, the website provides limited detail on specific product features, interest rates, fees, or competitive advantages in individual banking products. Customers researching specific offerings like CD rates, checking account fees, or credit card rewards terms will need to contact the bank directly or visit in person. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Trust account management and trust online access
Retirement account services (employee and employer plans)
Agricultural financing and seasonal cash flow management
pros: Ranked #6 on American Banker Top Performers List in 2025, indicating strong institutional performance
Recognized as a Top 50 ACH Originator by Nacha in 2025, demonstrating operational excellence in payments processing
Named one of the 50 Best Places to Work, reflecting positive employee experience and organizational culture
Offers comprehensive banking services including personal, business, trust, and retirement accounts across multiple platforms
Provides specialized agricultural banking services with seasonal cash flow management resources for farming customers
Operates multiple secure access channels including online banking, eZBusiness, and mobile platforms
ABA/Routing Number publicly listed (091305031) confirming regulatory status and operational legitimacy
cons: Website provides minimal specific information about product terms, interest rates, or fee structures for individual accounts
No pricing transparency visible for checking accounts, savings rates, or credit card rewards terms
Limited detail on minimum balance requirements, APY rates, or competitive positioning against other banks

contact.address: 100 N Main St, Watford City, ND 58854

best_for: Agricultural producers and farming operations requiring seasonal financing and specialized agricultural banking expertise
Business owners seeking comprehensive commercial banking solutions and ACH processing services
Trust and estate managers requiring dedicated trust account services and fraud prevention tools
Customers prioritizing work with a bank recognized for strong performance and workplace culture
diagnosis: FIBT is best for customers seeking traditional comprehensive banking services from an established, award-recognized institution, particularly those in agriculture or with business banking needs. The main caveat is that the website lacks specific product details, rates, and fees—prospective customers will need direct contact with the bank to compare offerings against competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 100 N Main St, Watford City, ND 58854
